description_long: This bonsai features a gracefully curved, dark brown trunk with pronounced bends and twists, giving it a dynamic and naturalistic appearance. The foliage is composed of several clusters of small, green leaves arranged in layered tiers along the branches, creating a balanced yet asymmetrical silhouette. At the base, the bonsai is planted in a simple, polygonal pot, accompanied by a small tuft of grass and a purple flower, adding a touch of color and realism. The branches extend horizontally and slightly upward, with each tier of leaves spaced to allow visibility of the trunk's elegant movement. The bark texture appears rough and matte, contrasting with the smooth, vibrant leaves. This bonsai would make a striking decorative element in an urban park, garden, or on a tabletop display.
description: A striking bonsai with a twisted, dark brown trunk and layered clusters of green leaves, set in a simple pot with grass and a purple flower at the base. The tree's dynamic form and naturalistic foliage make it ideal for decorative urban settings.
description_view_0: The bonsai is seen with its trunk curving leftward, displaying three main tiers of foliage and a visible purple flower and grass at the base.
description_view_1: This view highlights the trunk's backward lean and the dense foliage on the left, with the pot and base details partially obscured.
description_view_2: The trunk curves to the right, with the upper foliage appearing fuller and the base grass more visible, while the purple flower is less prominent.
description_view_3: The bonsai's trunk twists to the right, showing a clear separation between the foliage tiers and a prominent view of the grass at the base.
attribute_pot_type: Polygonal, short, brown ceramic pot with a matte finish and no visible decorative patterns.
attribute_trunk_curvature: Sharply twisted trunk with pronounced bends, following an informal upright (Moyogi) bonsai style, creating a dynamic and flowing movement.
attribute_branch_arrangement: Branches are arranged in layered, horizontal tiers with moderate spacing, giving a balanced yet asymmetrical silhouette typical of naturalistic bonsai.
attribute_leaf_density: Moderate to dense foliage, with clusters of leaves forming full canopies on each branch tier, though some trunk and branch structure remains visible.
